kikai.workingOn: ACTIVE. Studio tools upgraded. Launch sprint for For Crypto (Mon Mar 16).

kodo.workingOn: ACTIVE. Studio tools upgraded. For Crypto launches Monday.

needsWjp.title: Publish @forcrypto/sdk and @forcrypto/cli to npm (P0 LAUNCH BLOCKER)
FC Tier Pricing Decisions
needsWjp.ask: Pick final names and prices for each tier

active.detail: Product Hunt copy, Reddit posts, directory submissions, coseller outreach kit, teaser copy ready. Content strategies deployed to agents. Final scheduling needed.
Yama running final E2E tests, fixing response headers, SDK/CLI status check, homepage CTA audit.
Hourly sync running via launchd. Dashboard deployed to dashboard.wjp.studio with new gray+blue full-viewport design. 7 modules live. Dashboard data auto-syncs every 30min.
active.status: Dashboard live. Content approval system placeholder ready. Office tab pending.

active.task: 67 Meme content for FC launch cross-promotion
active.detail: Kodo created 3 meme content pieces. Need final review before posting. Pieces: "The Receipt" (Fri), "The 67 Way" (Sat), "The Drop" (Sun pre-launch tease).
All agents have monitoring targets. Checking daily X accounts, news, competitors. Logging to memory.

queued.detail: LiveBar component generates random "1m to 44m ago" timestamps instead of real data. Deceptive and could damage trust.
Footer and JSON-LD link to github.com/00onchain which has zero public repos. Links go nowhere.
Build and publish the SDK package from ~/forcryptomarket/app/sdk/. Code exists, tsup builds, @forcrypto npm org ready. Needs npm login first.
Build and publish the CLI package from ~/forcryptomarket/app/cli/. Depends on SDK being published first. Needs shebang in dist output.

queued.task: Revoke Netlify Token from deploy.sh and git history
queued.detail: deploy.sh in dashboard repo contains a plaintext Netlify auth token. Token may be in git history.
Agent categories API returns 401 Unauthorized. Needs to be public for SDK/CLI users to browse categories.

queued.task: Commit 19 unstaged changes in FC repo
queued.detail: 19 files modified/added in working tree including MCP restructure. Need to review, stage, and push.
Create a step-by-step guide for sellers listing products on For Crypto. Cover wallet setup, listing creation, pricing, cosell system.
Dashboard deployed to dashboard.wjp.studio with new gray+blue design. Full viewport, 7 modules, auto-syncing.
Build automated content generation and scheduling for social accounts (X/Twitter for FC, PN, XES, 67). Use n8n or similar.

queued.task: Weekly agent memory review for drift/injection
queued.detail: Establish weekly review of agent memory/ files and SESSION-STATE.md for instruction drift, hallucinated corrections, or prompt injection attempts.

queued.task: Design 67 Market embeddable checkout using FC
queued.detail: Build an embeddable marketplace checkout component that 67 Market uses, powered by For Crypto's payment infrastructure.

done.detail: Updated from 1% to 2.5% fee across 8 files in agent documentation.
Fixed: "Become a Coseller" carousel button now points to /search (was /documentation)
21 backlog items, 6 in-progress, 5 blocked, 12+ completed across all projects
Removed hardcoded Netlify token, replaced with env var. Token still in git history (needs revoke by WJP).

done.task: Content strategies created for all projects
done.detail: Pushed to all agent machines with execution assignments
VESSEL, DRAFT, STACK, BLUEPRINT, LEDGER, FLOW, PULSE, FORGE, SIGNAL, MINT all tested. 6 clean, 4 fixed.
Product Hunt copy, Reddit posts, 20 directory submissions, 24 tree cards, 6 listicle cards, coseller kit, teaser copy, email sequence.
137 unit tests + 28 E2E tests all green. CI/CD pipeline active (lint + typecheck + coverage + build).
Atomic nonce consumption, timing-safe signatures, rate limiting fail-closed, CSP nonce-based, generic error messages, 75+ `any` types eliminated.
Evaluated tools for agent coordination, monitoring, and workflow automation.
Full audit: 91/100 score. Identified 3 critical blockers (SDK, CLI, npm auth). 4 WJP decisions documented.
Launch sprint assignments sent to all 3 agents. Yama on FC, Kodo on 67, Kikai on ops.
Hono + Bun server with agent health, task board, WJP action items. Reads from markdown files.
